pi_items.source: setup_task.sh python script generates 145 attacker failures and 20 normal noise failures, totaling 165 SSH failure events (rule 5716)
setup_task.sh python script generates exactly 2 attacker successes and 20 normal noise successes, totaling 22 SSH success events (rule 5715)
setup_task.sh script explicitly seeds the ATTACKERS array with these exact values to generate synthetic alerts

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated Wazuh alert logs representing an SSH brute-force attack. The synthetic setup script dynamically injects exactly 165 SSH failure events (145 from attackers plus 20 from normal noise) and 22 SSH success events (2 from attackers plus 20 from normal noise). This contradicts the metadata claims of 145 failures and 23 successes. The expected top attacker IPs (185.220.101.42, 45.33.32.156, and 103.253.41.98) and their respective failure counts and compromised hosts precisely match the setup parameters and are verified. The final report is expected to be saved to /home/ga/threat_hunt_report.json.
